name: Farverse
description: The Farverse is a growing ecosystem of games and applications being built in the Farcaster ecosystem with thousand of daily onchain players. The $FARVERSE token is a utility token that connects all the games including FarPets, Slay to Earn and many more to come. The goal of the project is to create a real rewards token ecosystem that rewards active and committed players rather than pay-to-win or gambling mechanics.
